first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively identical. Both versions correctly identify the candidate's strengths in tooling and systems engineering while noting the critical mismatch with the required Java/Kotlin/Spring stack. The minor differences in wording are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not indicate a reaction to the redaction of the candidate's name.
